notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Benintendi reaches on a fielder's choice. Miguel Vargas to 2nd. Miguel Vargas advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by shortstop Tristan Gray.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Rikuu Nishida reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Tristan Gray. Rikuu Nishida to 2nd. Rikuu Nishida advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by shortstop Tristan Gray.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Rikuu Nishida reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Tristan Gray. Rikuu Nishida to 2nd. Rikuu Nishida advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by shortstop Tristan Gray.

notableEvents.label: Drew Romo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Drew Romo grounds into a double play, second baseman Luke Keaschall to shortstop Tristan Gray to first baseman Orlando Arcia. Jacob Gonzalez out at 2nd. Drew Romo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Rikuu Nishida reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Rikuu Nishida reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Tristan Gray. Rikuu Nishida to 2nd. Rikuu Nishida advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by shortstop Tristan Gray.

notableEvents.label: Randal Grichuk pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Randal Grichuk lines out to first baseman Orlando Arcia.

notableEvents.label: Sam Antonacci plunked
notableEvents.detail: Sam Antonacci hit by pitch. Derek Hill to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Luisangel Acuña pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luisangel Acuña pops out to shortstop Ryan Kreidler on the infield fly rule.
